case_title: THOMAS, SPENCER vs. LOPEZ, ISABEL et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, SPENCER SERVED OCT-18-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ISABEL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ISABEL
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, SPENCER AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ISABEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, SPENCER AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ISABEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, SPENCER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ISABEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 95 CARRIZAL #1, LEASE FORFEITED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ISABEL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $18.34 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, SPENCER
